fields.description: Base URL encoded into each QR/barcode. Card code is appended as a path segment: /s/<code>
fields.label: QR Scan Base URL
Card Code Prefix
fields.description: Optional brand prefix on every generated card code, e.g. OXFX → OXFX-7K9M-4P2T. Leave blank for no prefix. Letters/digits only.

fields.label: Play Store URL
fields.description: Google Play Store link shown on fallback page when app is not installed

fields.label: App Store URL
fields.description: Apple App Store link shown on fallback page when app is not installed
Master switch. When unchecked, request_withdrawal() is rejected entirely regardless of anything else - a kill switch for the whole feature.
fields.label: Enable Withdrawals

fields.description: 1 point = this many currency units. Snapshotted onto each Coupon Withdrawal Request at creation time - changing this later never affects an already-created request.
fields.label: Points to Currency Rate
